description: Perform Quality Control (QC) on the Muncie HEC-RAS unsteady simulation results to detect numerical instabilities. Analyze the Water Surface Elevation (WSE) time series for all cross-sections in the 'Muncie.p04.hdf' result file by creating a Python script named 'instability_detector.py' in '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/'. Calculate an 'Oscillation Index' for each cross-section using the formula: Sum(|WSE_t+1 - WSE_t|) / (WSE_max - WSE_min). Save a report to '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/instability_report.csv' containing columns 'RiverStation', 'OscillationIndex', 'TotalVariation_ft', and 'Range_ft', sorted by Oscillation Index in descending order. Generate a plot of the WSE time series for the single most unstable cross-section and save it as '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/worst_instability.png'.
